# Creatio Core Concepts

## Packages
Deployment unit. Contains schemas, data, resources, SQL scripts.

```
PackageName/
├── descriptor.json    # UId, version, name, dependencies
├── Schemas/           # Entity, ClientModule, SourceCode, etc.
├── Data/              # Seed/lookup data
├── Resources/         # Localizable strings
├── SqlScripts/        # SQL migrations
└── Files/src/         # JS, CSS, LESS, images
```

**Types:** Preinstalled (read-only) | Custom (editable) | Assembly (.NET DLL) | Composable app

**descriptor.json:**
```json
{
  "Descriptor": {
    "UId": "guid-here",
    "PackageVersion": "8.1.0",
    "Name": "UsrMyPackage",
    "Maintainer": "CompanyName",
    "DependsOn": [{ "UId": "guid", "PackageVersion": "8.1.0", "Name": "CrtCore" }]
  }
}
```

## Schema Types

| Type | Creates | Use |
|------|---------|-----|
| **Entity (Object)** | ORM class + DB table | Data model |
| **Client Module** | Freedom UI page/component | Front-end |
| **Source Code** | C# class | Server logic |
| **Business Process** | BPMN workflow | Automation |
| **SQL Script** | DB query/view/procedure | Data migration |
| **Data** | Seed records | Lookup values |

## Freedom UI (Current)
- Angular-based, MVVM, HandlerChain pattern
- Composable architecture, `Crt` prefix packages (e.g. `CrtCore`)
- JSON-configured schemas, not imperative code
- All new development MUST use Freedom UI

## Classic UI (Legacy — DO NOT USE)
- ExtJS-based (`Ext.define`), being deprecated
- `Base` package prefix
- Only maintain existing Classic UI, never create new

## Architecture Layers
```
DesignTime → Schema (metadata JSON)
RunTime    → View (Angular) + ViewModel (logic) + Model (data)
```

## Database Support
- **On-premises:** MSSQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle
- **Cloud:** PostgreSQL only
- **Cache:** Redis
- All SQL must be compatible with BOTH MSSQL and PostgreSQL
